#!/bin/bash
# Start Mission Control servers
cd /Users/bobbygalletta/agent-mission-control

# Kill existing
pkill -f "mission-control-api" 2>/dev/null
pkill -f "vite.*8787" 2>/dev/null
sleep 1

# Start API
/opt/homebrew/bin/node server/mission-control-api.cjs >> /tmp/mc-api.log 2>&1 &
echo "API started on port 3001"

# Start Vite
./node_modules/.bin/vite --port 8787 --host >> /tmp/vite.log 2>&1 &
echo "Vite started on port 8787"

# Verify
sleep 2
curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/bills > /dev/null && echo "API OK" || echo "API FAILED"
curl -s http://localhost:8787/ > /dev/null && echo "Frontend OK" || echo "Frontend FAILED"
